--- output: html_document: css: css/website-cv.css toc: true toc_float: true --- # Summary I am *[Md. Jubayer Hossain](https://hossainlab.github.io/)*. I am the founder and Executive Director of [CHIRAL Bangladesh](https://chiralbd.org/), a non-profit biomedical research organization dedicated to solving public health problems in Bangladesh. Additionally, I am also working as a health data analysis instructor at [cBLAST](https://www.cblastdu.xyz/). My professional endeavors aim to maximize the quality of life for individuals by operating at the intersection of education, technology, and health research. I am interested in applying modern data science techniques in the context of disease diagnosis and large data analytics for public health while focusing on bridging the gap between computational and experimental laboratories through highly engaging and fruitful collaborations. [``{=html} CV as PDF](https://ulriklyngs.com/pdfs/academic_cv.pdf) # Experiences {.domain-header} ## Research Positions ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} |dates |role | |:--------------------|:-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------| |2023--Present |Founder & Executive Director

[Bio-Bio-1:: Bioinformatics Research Discussion Group]() | ::: ::: ## Teaching Experience ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} |dates |role | |:------------------|:---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------| |2020--Present |Lead Organizer & Instructor
Traiining Unit, [Center for Health Innovation, Research, Action and Learning - Bangladesh (CHIRAL Bangladesh)](https://chiralbd.org/)
Led a team of instructors and educators, providing guidance and mentorship to ensure the delivery of high‑quality education.Designed and developed comprehensive curriculum for health data analysis courses, ensuring relevance to industry trends and best practices | |2023--Present |Instructor
Health Data Analysis, [Center for Bioinformatics Learning Advancement and Systematic Training (cBLAST)](https://www.cblastdu.xyz/)
As an Instructor at cBLAST, I contribute to the advancement of bioinformatics knowledge and skills by designing and delivering engaging educational programs. Through hands-on training and systematic learning, I empower students and professionals to harness the potential of bioinformatics in various scientific and healthcare applications.| |Oct 2022--Dec 2022 |Teaching Assistant
Department of Microbiology, [Jagannath University](https://jnu.ac.bd/dept/portal/web/microbiology)
As a Teaching Assistant for the Public Health & Hygiene course, I provided vital support to the Department of Microbiology at Jagannath University. I assisted in delivering an impactful educational experience that emphasized public health principles and hygiene practices to aspiring microbiologists. | ::: ::: ## Courses and Workshops ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} |dates |role | |:-------------|:---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------| |2022--Present |Instructor,R for Research

Participated in a cutting‑edge project focused on the application of bioinformatics techniques for profiling antibiotic resistance genes within complex metagenomic DNA sequences.| ::: ::: ## Training ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} | year|title | |----:|:----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------| | 2023| AI in Public Health , [Child Health Research Foundation (CHRF)](https://chrfbd.org/blogs/f0cc0f49-f22e-426e-b63f-e432c89d0d0e) , Dhaka, Bangladesh
